---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an error, ambiguity, or unclear information in the documentation
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Description
Describe the issue clearly. Is it an error in specifications, unclear instructions, outdated information, or a missing detail?

## Location
Which section of the documentation contains the issue?
- [ ] Procurement List
- [ ] Schematic
- [ ] Installation Checklist
- [ ] Programming Instructions
- [ ] Test Plan
- [ ] Other: _____________

## Current Information
What does the documentation currently say?

```
[paste the relevant text here]
```

## Expected Information
What should it say instead? What's missing or incorrect?

## Impact
How does this affect someone following the guide?
- [ ] Critical (prevents installation or causes safety issue)
- [ ] High (causes confusion or incorrect component selection)
- [ ] Medium (minor clarification needed)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic or trivial)

## Additional Context
Add any other context, images, diagrams, or references that would help:
- Real-world installation experience?
- Specific component version or part number involved?
- Related issues or discussions?

---

**Thank you for helping improve solarplan! 🚢**
